---
title: "Sarah Barfoot"
---

## Sarah Barfoot

**Dates:** (b. 1806/7 or 1810/1)

### Description

wife of John Barfoot, carpenter

### Biography

Her age is given differently in the 1851 and 1841 censuses.

### Letters

- Letter from Monday 17th April [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
